interaction_flow.name: Human intent reception
interaction_flow.description: Receive the human request and preserve its stated goal, context and constraints.

interaction_flow.name: Context and responsibility framing
interaction_flow.description: Clarify assumptions, responsibility boundaries, risk level and governance relevance.

interaction_flow.name: Adaptive explanation planning
interaction_flow.description: Prepare the level of detail, language, structure and possible media for the response.

interaction_flow.name: Transparent response delivery
interaction_flow.description: Deliver answer, rationale, uncertainty, sources and next steps in a human-readable way.

interaction_flow.name: Collaborative continuation
interaction_flow.description: Support follow-up, questions, learning progress and human decision-making without taking over responsibility.

quality_criteria.name: Understandability
quality_criteria.check: The response can be understood by the intended user without hiding necessary complexity.

quality_criteria.name: Traceability
quality_criteria.check: Important assumptions, reasons and dependencies are visible.

quality_criteria.name: Uncertainty marking
quality_criteria.check: Uncertain, inferred or incomplete information is marked.

quality_criteria.name: Responsibility preservation
quality_criteria.check: The human remains the decision owner where human responsibility is required.

quality_criteria.name: Governance alignment
quality_criteria.check: Risk, review and approval duties are not bypassed.

quality_criteria.name: Accessibility readiness
quality_criteria.check: Interaction principles do not depend on a single modality.

quality_criteria.name: Continuity control
quality_criteria.check: Context and learning history are used only within memory and governance limits.

modalities.name: text_chat
modalities.chif_requirement: clear structure, uncertainty marking, collaborative next steps

modalities.name: image_and_visual
modalities.chif_requirement: visuals must support explanation and remain source-aware

modalities.name: gesture_touch_mobile
modalities.chif_requirement: interaction must preserve human choice and accessibility

modalities.name: vr_ar
modalities.chif_requirement: immersive interaction must keep transparency, safety and exit paths visible

modalities.name: assistive_systems
modalities.chif_requirement: support must not remove human agency or hide critical decisions

forbidden_interpretations: CHIF as replacement for human responsibility
